<{%fg 2%}>+ codeinfra:providers:pkgA: (create)
<{%fg 2%}>    [urn=urn:codeinfra:test::test::codeinfra:providers:pkgA::default]
<{%reset%}><{%reset%}><{%fg 2%}>+ pkgA:m:typC: (create)
<{%fg 2%}>    [urn=urn:codeinfra:test::test::pkgA:m:typC::resC]
<{%reset%}><{%reset%}>    <{%fg 2%}>+ pkgA:m:typA: (create)
<{%fg 2%}>        [urn=urn:codeinfra:test::test::pkgA:m:typC$pkgA:m:typA::resA]
<{%reset%}><{%fg 2%}>        foo: <{%reset%}><{%fg 2%}>2<{%reset%}><{%fg 2%}>
<{%reset%}><{%reset%}><{%fg 13%}><{%bold%}>Resources:<{%reset%}>
    <{%fg 2%}>+ 2 created<{%reset%}>

<{%fg 13%}><{%bold%}>Duration:<{%reset%}> 1s
